pages.title: I'm That Somebody
pages.tagline: Be the one they've been waiting for.

pages.body: Slide into this glossy late-90s club track where confidence meets chiptune nostalgia. At 96 BPM, smooth male vocals glide over sparse syncopated drums and a rubbery bassline that feels as alive as a living room console from Y2K. The journey begins with playful mystery in the intro, moves through observant caution before exploding into unwavering assurance during the hook. Here, secrets are kept close while bright FM synth riffs evoke classic blue-sky video game worlds. It is an anthem of romantic stability where you reject neediness to embrace the thrill of now. Keep it locked and quiet as we navigate flirty duality until reaching devoted commitment in the bridge.
pages.styleSentence: A glossy late-90s club track at 96 BPM featuring sparse syncopated drums with off-grid percussion clicks, a rubbery bassline, and bright chiptune/FM synth riffs that evoke classic blue-sky video game music, all anchored by smooth confident male vocals utilizing intimate spoken replies to create a stop-start rhythmic pocket.

pages.text:
[Intro - Whispered, playful]
Yeah
You asked me a question
I already had the answer
Listen

[Verse 1 - Smooth Male Vocal]
You been moving cautious
Like the room got eyes
Like the walls might talk
Like the night got spies

I see how you look
When the bassline drops
Half a smile on your face
Then you tell me stop

You got secrets in your rhythm
Little warnings in your tone
But I’m not here to run it
I’m here to bring it home

[Pre-Chorus - Sung then spoken]
Iiii wooon’t let thiiis shooow
[Spoken] Won’t tell a soul, not anybody

Iiii knooow how thiiis goooes
[Spoken] Keep it locked, keep it quiet, nobody

If you let me close
[Spoken] I won’t make it public, no

If you let me know
[Spoken] I won’t tell nobody
I’m talking nobody

[Hook - Catchy, same sung/spoken pattern]
You al-rea-dy know
You said you need somebody
I said I’ll be that somebody

Say less, don’t say no
You don’t gotta need somebody
I’m right here, I’m that somebody

You al-rea-dy know
You said you need somebody
I said I’ll be that somebody

Say less, don’t say no
You don’t gotta need somebody
I’m right here, I’m that somebody

[Post-Hook - Vocal chops, playful]
That somebody
That somebody
I’ll be that somebody
Nobody, nobody
I won’t tell nobody

[Verse 2 - Flirty, confident]
You asked if I’m steady
Girl, you know I don’t fold
I don’t move reckless
I don’t speak what I’m told

You can test my patience
You can check my pride
I’ll still keep your name
On the safer side

You don’t need a rumor
You don’t need a scene
You need somebody solid
When the lights go green

And if the world gets loud
I’ll turn the noise down low
Put your trust in my hands
And I won’t let it go

[Pre-Chorus 2 - Direct response, sung then spoken]
Youuu knooow I’m respooonsible
[Spoken] You ain’t gotta watch your back when I’m beside you

Youuu knooow I’m respooonsible
[Spoken] I don’t need the spotlight just to hide you

You’re not just anybody
[Spoken] That’s why I move different when I’m around you

You’re not just anybody
[Spoken] I saw that from the first time I found you

[Hook]
You al-rea-dy know
You said you need somebody
I said I’ll be that somebody

Say less, don’t say no
You don’t gotta need somebody
I’m right here, I’m that somebody

You al-rea-dy know
You said you need somebody
I said I’ll be that somebody

Say less, don’t say no
You don’t gotta need somebody
I’m right here, I’m that somebody

[Bridge - Lower, more intimate]
Sometimes you’re sweet, sweet
Sometimes you’re trouble, trouble
Sometimes you pull me close
Then act like I said too much though

I like it when you’re goody, goody
I love it when you’re naughty, naughty
Either way, you got me, got me
I’m not leaving this party, party

[Breakdown - Half sung, half spoken, highlight section]
Iiii wooon’t let thiiis gooo
[Spoken] Won’t tell nobody, I’m talking nobody

If you let me know
[Spoken] I won’t tell nobody, I’m talking nobody

If you let me close
[Spoken] I’ll keep it between you and me

If you let this grow
[Spoken] I’ll be exactly who I said I’d be

Iiii wooon’t let thiiis gooo
[Spoken] Won’t tell nobody, I’m talking nobody

If you let me know
[Spoken] I won’t tell nobody, I’m talking nobody

[Final Hook - Bigger, more melodic]
You al-rea-dy know
You said you need somebody
I said I’ll be that somebody

Say less, don’t say no
You don’t gotta need somebody
I’m right here, I’m that somebody

You al-rea-dy know
You said you need somebody
I said I’ll be that somebody

Say less, don’t say no
You don’t gotta need somebody
I’m right here, I’m that somebody

[Outro - Whispered over quirky beat]
Nobody
Nobody
I won’t tell nobody

You already know
I’ll be that somebody

pages.caption: A neon-lit R&B arcade from 1998 featuring rubbery bass, off-grid clicks, and bright FM synth riffs that turn a love song into an interactive

pages.vocalStyle: Smooth male lead with playful confidence mixed with intimate whispered ad-libs and staccato spoken interjections between sung phrases

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Slides smoothly over staccato beats with intimate whispered replies.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Layers harmonies to create depth without stealing the spotlight.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking with off-grid percussion clicks.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Adds subtle texture between downbeats like a secret heartbeat.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Grooves rubbery and deep, anchoring every playful moment in place.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Casts bright FM riffs that feel like classic blue-sky game music.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Weaves atmospheric noise to keep the futuristic mood alive.

members.name: KEYS
members.bio: Plays gentle chords under smooth vocals for a warm finish.
